hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer — Platform Architecture & Enterprise ERP Integration
hero.tagline: I architect platforms that connect business-critical systems — from discovery to production, with code operations never has to touch again.

about.title: Full-Stack Developer · ERP Integration · Multi-tenant SaaS
bio: Full-Stack Developer with 3+ years shipping production software for real clients. I work at the intersection of ERP integration, multi-tenant SaaS architecture and enterprise middleware — the surface where a bug means broken invoicing, not a red toast.

I've built bidirectional sync engines between SAGE 300 and government-facing portals, multi-tenant architectures with strict per-client data isolation, complex payment integrations, and AI-augmented internal tools that cut weekly headcount-hours. I run discovery directly with stakeholders, scope, and deliver.
I measure my work in automated operations, errors eliminated and processes that no longer need human attention — not in lines of code shipped.
about.availableBody: Available for scoped freelance engagements and long-term collaborations. Part-time or full-time.
about.servicesSubtitle: Specializations backed by production case studies.

erp.title: ERP Middleware Integration
erp.description: I connect SAGE 300 and Odoo with supplier portals, fiscal gateways and legacy systems. Invoices, purchase orders and payments flow without human intervention.

saas.title: Multi-tenant SaaS Architecture
saas.description: Platforms where N companies operate on isolated data over the same infrastructure. Stripe Webhooks, real-time booking, roles and analytics from the very first tenant.

apis.title: Cross-system API Integration
apis.description: I orchestrate systems speaking different protocols — XML, REST, OAuth2, XML-RPC — into transactional flows that don't lose atomicity or collide on webhooks.

ai.title: AI-augmented Internal Tools
ai.description: Applications that replace repetitive manual processes: Gemini AI-powered quoters that read PDF requirements, generate documents and write auditable history.

webapp.title: Custom Web Applications
webapp.description: Operational dashboards, internal portals and management systems designed around the actual business process — from discovery to deploy.

projects.title: What I've shipped in production
projects.subtitle: Real case studies, documented stack and verifiable metrics.

cardeal.title: Cardeal
cardeal.description: End-to-end car rental platform that turned a fully offline operation (phone-based quotes, manual payments, paper confirmations) into a self-service online flow. Orchestrates three parallel external integrations on Next.js 15 + MongoDB.
cardeal.problem: Rental operations ran 100% offline: availability checked over the phone, payments processed by hand, confirmations printed on paper. No single system tied real-time inventory, payment processing and document generation together.
cardeal.solution: Full-stack platform on Next.js 15 + MongoDB orchestrating three concurrent integrations: TSD XML API for live inventory (parsed with xml2js), Flap Payment Gateway with async confirmation webhook, and an in-person counter-payment option. End-to-end flow: search → vehicle → insurance plans with dynamic pricing → extras (GPS, child seats, coverage) → tax calculation → payment → confirmation with PDF and unique QR per booking. Authentication via JWT + bcryptjs and sensitive-data encryption with crypto-js.
cardeal.impact: What used to require multiple phone calls and paper-trail now completes online in minutes. The customer receives a downloadable PDF with QR instantly. Manual booking, billing and document operations were eliminated.
highlights: TSD XML API: real-time vehicle availability and pricing parsed via xml2js
Flap Gateway with `/api/webhook-success` for async confirmation; counter-payment option
Insurance with dynamic pricing per vehicle category; configurable extras (GPS, seats, coverage)
Server-side PDF with @react-pdf/renderer; unique QR per booking via qrcode + qrcode.react
JWT + bcryptjs for auth; crypto-js for sensitive data; UUIDs per booking
React Hook Form + Yup validation; transactional email via Nodemailer; obfuscated build delivery

sageconnect.title: SageConnect
sageconnect.description: Bidirectional sync engine between SAGE 300 ERP and the Suppliers Portal (Focaltec) that eliminated manual entry across the full lifecycle of e-invoices, purchase orders, payments and payment complements. Multi-tenant architecture: multiple companies operate in parallel with fully isolated data.
sageconnect.problem: Procurement was capturing every e-invoice, PO and payment twice — once in SAGE 300, once in the Suppliers Portal. Hours lost daily, double-entry errors hitting the accounting team, and sync drift damaging vendor relationships and fiscal audits.
sageconnect.solution: Bidirectional SAGE 300 ↔ Focaltec sync engine running every 15 minutes via Windows Task Scheduler. Handles the full PO lifecycle, pulls e-invoices from the portal and invokes `ImportaFacturasFocaltec.exe` directly to import them into the ERP, processes payments and payment complements. True multi-tenant: each company is configured with its own credentials (TENANT_ID, API_KEY, API_SECRET, RFC) and independent SQL Server database — all running side by side in the same instance.
sageconnect.impact: Zero duplicate captures. Hours of manual reconciliation collapsed into a 15-minute job with no human intervention. Multiple companies operate in parallel with strictly isolated data. Accounting reconciliation errors eliminated.
highlights: Bidirectional SAGE 300 ↔ Focaltec sync with guaranteed atomicity
Full PO lifecycle: creation, updates, closure and cancellation propagated automatically
Portal e-invoice pull + import via ImportaFacturasFocaltec.exe through child_process
Payments and payment complements with RFC and fiscal regime validation (CFDI 4.0)
True multi-tenant: parallel credential arrays and per-company SQL Server databases
15-min scheduler via Windows Task Scheduler; AUTO_TERMINATE for clean exit
Configurable email notifications via Gmail OAuth2 or SMTP with per-tenant recipient lists
Structured logging with log4js + Winston; real-time log dashboard; obfuscated delivery

cleany.title: Cleany SaaS
cleany.description: Multi-tenant SaaS live in production (cleany.pro) for residential and commercial cleaning agencies in Mexico: strict per-tenant data isolation, real-time booking and route tracking, recurring and one-off payments via Stripe Webhooks, WhatsApp and email automation, and operational analytics — Next.js 15 + Fastify + PostgreSQL + Docker.
cleany.problem: Agencies in the sector were running on WhatsApp and Excel: no revenue visibility, no occupancy control, no service traceability and no measurable retention. Scaling meant hiring more admin staff. A proprietary SaaS solution was economically out of reach.
cleany.solution: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with PostgreSQL data isolation per client under the same Docker infrastructure. Fastify backend for high concurrency. Stripe Webhooks handle recurring subscriptions and one-off payments. Booking engine computes availability by cross-referencing staff schedules, service zones and cleaning type. Live route panel with delay tracking, automated reminders via WhatsApp and email, automatic invoicing and reports on cash flow, revenue and performance.
cleany.impact: Live product at cleany.pro serving cleaning agencies in Mexico. Operational setup in ~15 minutes per agency. New-tenant onboarding with zero marginal infrastructure cost — each agency gets full digital operations from day one.
highlights: Live in production at cleany.pro — residential and commercial cleaning agencies in Mexico
Multi-tenant with PostgreSQL data isolation per company (schema-per-tenant)
Fastify backend: low latency and high concurrency across tenants
Stripe Webhooks: recurring subscriptions, one-off payments, dunning handling
Booking engine and live route panel with delay tracking and customer satisfaction signals
WhatsApp and email automation: reminders, confirmations and collections
Automatic invoicing and reports on cash flow, revenue and performance
360° management: customers, staff, auto-assignment by zone, service history
256-bit encryption, backups every 6h and containerized infrastructure with Docker Compose
TypeScript end-to-end and new-agency onboarding in ~15 minutes

tersoft-cotizador.title: Tersoft Quoter
tersoft-cotizador.description: Internal tool that compressed the quote-to-customer cycle from 45 minutes to under 5 by integrating Odoo XML-RPC, Gemini AI, jsPDF, Google Sheets API and Nodemailer. Today it's the backbone of the sales team's commercial flow.
tersoft-cotizador.problem: Every quote: open Odoo, copy prices into Excel, manually format a PDF, attach and email. 30–45 min per salesperson, frequent pricing errors and no central history.
tersoft-cotizador.solution: Next.js 15 with five integrations: Odoo via odoo-xmlrpc (real-time catalog), Gemini AI for drafting assistance and parsing PDF requirement docs (pdf-parse), jsPDF with corporate template, Google Sheets API as auditable history, and Nodemailer for attachment delivery. NextAuth handles sales-team auth.
tersoft-cotizador.impact: Time per quote: −88% (45 min → 5 min). Catalog always up to date from Odoo, eliminating pricing errors. Centralized auditable history filterable by salesperson, period and status.
highlights: Odoo XML-RPC: real-time product catalog and pricing
Gemini AI: drafting assistance and PDF requirement parsing (pdf-parse)
jsPDF: client-side generation with corporate template; download via file-saver
Google Sheets API: auditable history filterable by salesperson, date, total and status
Nodemailer: automatic delivery with PDF attached and salesperson cc'd
NextAuth: sales-team auth with managed sessions

innova.title: Innova
innova.description: Custom Odoo modules built on the company's real operational flow: sales, accounting and inventory automated end-to-end, with requirements discovery handled directly with stakeholders.

belle-health.title: Belle & Health
belle-health.description: Custom Odoo modules for a high-throughput clinical operation: inventory traceability, receiving and bulk load, automated reconciliation — eliminating bottlenecks in a business with intensive operational volume.

biomotion-dashboard.title: Biomotion · Clinical Dashboard
biomotion-dashboard.description: Multi-role operations panel for Clínica Integral Biomotion (Cuautla, Morelos): patients, doctors, scheduling, consultations, medical records, pharmacy POS, inventory and medication catalog — unifying the entire daily flow in a single system.
biomotion-dashboard.problem: The clinic ran on disconnected tools: notebooks, spreadsheets and an isolated POS. No consolidated KPIs, no real-time inventory, no unified patient record.
biomotion-dashboard.solution: Dashboard with multi-section sidebar (Operations + Pharmacy) centralizing patients, doctors, scheduling, consultations, profiles and clinical history alongside a POS with inventory and medications. Live KPIs (appointments, active patients, revenue) with Chart.js. Custom design system (Fraunces + Figtree + IBM Plex Mono) consistent with the public landing.
biomotion-dashboard.impact: Single interface for the entire clinical-administrative flow. Doctors see the full day; pharmacy runs POS and inventory without leaving the system. Drastic reduction of tool-switching and data-entry errors.
highlights: Multi-role: general panel, records, scheduling, consultations, doctor and patient profiles
Pharmacy POS with inventory and medication catalog in the same system
Live KPIs (today's appointments, active patients, revenue) with Chart.js
Longitudinal per-patient clinical history
In-house design system consistent with the public landing
Deployed on Vercel with optimized static configuration

biomotion-landing.title: Biomotion · Landing
biomotion-landing.description: Public site for Clínica Integral Biomotion: rehabilitation, physical therapy, medical care, nutrition, psychology, cosmetology and dentistry in Cuautla, Morelos. Editorial identity, persistent WhatsApp CTA, reusable appointment modal and PHP endpoint for radiology reports.
biomotion-landing.problem: The multidisciplinary clinic relied on social media to attract patients — with no proprietary channel to showcase services and facilities, and no formal pipeline for sending radiology reports.
biomotion-landing.solution: Multi-page site (home, about, services, facilities, contact) with editorial identity. Persistent WhatsApp CTA, reusable appointment modal and PHP endpoint `reporte_radiologica.php` for digital report delivery from the clinical area.
biomotion-landing.impact: Direct acquisition channel without depending on social media. The modal unifies conversion across all pages. The PHP endpoint digitizes a previously 100% paper-based flow.
highlights: Multi-page site with local SEO in metadata
Persistent WhatsApp CTA and reusable appointment modal
PHP endpoint for digital radiology report delivery
Editorial design consistent with the internal dashboard
Mobile-optimized; lightweight load with no frameworks

ad-fitness.title: A&D Fitness Center
ad-fitness.description: Full platform for a gym in Huitzuco, Guerrero: public acquisition landing + admin dashboard with clients, pyramidal routines (% 1RM), diets using the Mexican equivalents system, monthly billing, body assessments and longitudinal progress tracking.
ad-fitness.problem: 100% manual operations: pyramidal routines in Word (% 1RM, warm-up, main set, cool-down), meal plans in Excel using the Mexican equivalents system, monthly billing in a notebook and body measurements with no history. Every new client started from scratch.
ad-fitness.solution: Dual system: public landing + dashboard with clients, routines (exercise library and pyramidal method), diets (equivalents-based builder), assessments, progress, billing, calendar and personalized services. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, multi-page, deliverable as a static site.
ad-fitness.impact: The owner's methodology (pyramidal + Mexican equivalents) digitized and reusable. Each client keeps full history. Time to generate new routines and diets dramatically reduced.
highlights: Public landing with amber/gold identity and clear CTAs
Admin dashboard: clients, routines, diets, assessments, progress, billing, calendar
Pyramidal routine builder with exercise library and % 1RM
Diet builder using the Mexican equivalents system across 5 meals
Progress history: weight, BMI, body fat %, muscle %
Vanilla multi-page deliverable as a static site, no required backend

pegasus.title: Pegasus — Workshop OS
pegasus.description: Internal ERP/CRM for Mantenimiento Automotriz Profesional (Huitzuco, Guerrero): service orders with a state machine, monthly atomic folio, parts and services catalogs, customer and vehicle management, PDF generation and immutable activity log. Stack: Next.js 14 + Prisma + Supabase.
pegasus.problem: The workshop tracked service orders in a notebook: manual numbering prone to gaps and duplicates, totals calculated by hand with rounding risk, parts catalog out of date, no change traceability and no formal deliverable for the customer.
pegasus.solution: Workshop OS on Next.js 14 (App Router) + Prisma + Supabase Auth. State machine for orders, monthly atomic folio `OS/YY/MM/NNN`, totals computed in `Decimal` (no floating-point), CRUD catalogs for parts (margin + stock) and services (price by vehicle type), customers and vehicles with soft delete, PDF via `@react-pdf/renderer`, immutable activity log visible only to ADMIN. Unit tests with Vitest and e2e with Playwright.
pegasus.impact: Atomic folio → zero duplicates. Decimal math → zero rounding errors. Professional PDF replaces the notebook. Activity log gives full traceability — key in a workshop where multiple users touch the same order.
highlights: Orders with state machine and monthly atomic folio `OS/YY/MM/NNN`
Totals computed in `Decimal` (decimal.js) — zero rounding errors
Supabase Auth with 7-day session and full `forgot password` flow
CRUD catalogs: parts (margin + stock) and services (price by vehicle type)
Order PDF with `@react-pdf/renderer` and corporate template
Immutable activity log visible only to ADMIN; soft delete
Unit tests (Vitest) and e2e (Playwright) covering critical flows

experience.title: Professional track record

description: Built 15+ custom deliveries for clients across manufacturing, distribution, professional services, retail, construction, agribusiness, logistics and healthcare — from discovery to delivery.
Built SageConnect: SAGE 300 ↔ Focaltec automation engine that eliminated manual reconciliation of e-invoices and POs (−95% recurring operational work).
Verticalized Odoo (SaaS / Odoo.sh) across Sales, Accounting, Inventory, CRM and Projects with integrations that cut client-side operational time by up to −30%.
Built an internal quoter with dynamic multi-currency pricing and automatic PDF generation, compressing the sales cycle.
Standardized the Odoo.sh deploy pipeline for new-client onboarding, cutting implementation from weeks to days.
Built an electronic invoicing system (CFDI) on React that eliminated manual invoicing errors by centralizing receipt generation.
Centralized billing data to enable real-time reporting for the administrative team.
Migrated operational flows from Excel to a web interface, accelerating processing for the accounting team.

utez.description: Engineering program focused on professional software development: analysis, design, implementation, testing and production deployment.
highlights: Full-stack training: from algorithm to deploy — frontend, backend, data, DevOps and security.
Team capstone projects using agile methodologies (Scrum), collaborative version control and iterative delivery.
Emphasis on systems architecture, design patterns, data modeling and scalable REST APIs.
Applied cybersecurity work: vulnerability analysis, OWASP Top 10 and hardening — extended on my own into binary analysis and reverse engineering on iOS with Ghidra.
